data.title: EndoQuest partners with NVIDIA to integrate IGX Thor into robotic surgery for better precision and vision.
data.description: In Houston, EndoQuest Robotics, Inc., a prominent company in endoluminal robotic surgical technology, has revealed their latest partnership with NVIDIA. Through this collaboration, they plan to incorporate NVIDIA IGX Thor, an enterprise-ready platform powered by NVIDIA Blackwell, into EndoQuest’s upcoming robotic system. The joint efforts will concentrate on merging EndoQuest’s visualization system, robotic control, and secure cloud services with NVIDIA’s Physical AI software stack. This move aims to revolutionize the field by leveraging cutting-edge technology, with NVIDIA IGX Thor at the core, to enhance surgical processes.

data.title: PepperPointe Partnerships appoints three new Vice Presidents to enhance operational and financial strategy. Lexington, KY, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: PepperPointe Partnerships, a leading dentist-owned and dentist-managed dental service organization (DSO), based in Lexington, Kentucky, made public on January 12, 2026, that it has introduced new positions aimed at enhancing operational efficiencies and financial planning throughout the company. The DSO, renowned for its large scale and privacy, has taken this step to further solidify its standing in the industry.

data.title: SafeSpace Global Corp (OTCID: SSGC) CEO issues letter to shareholders, highlighting 2025 milestones and 2026 uplisting progress.
data.description: In Knoxville, TN on January 12, 2026, SafeSpace Global Corporation (OTCID: SSGC) revealed their achievements and future plans. The company, known for its AI technology in safety solutions for various sectors, shared a comprehensive shareholder letter from CEO Scott M. Boruff. The letter highlighted the company's accomplishments in 2025 and outlined the progress made towards uplisting in 2026. This information was disclosed by the leading technology company which operates in education, healthcare, transportation, and correctional facilities.

data.title: Kipu launches intelligent OS for behavioral healthcare industry at JPM Week; shows strong customer growth - Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: During JPM Week on January 12, 2026 in Miami, Kipu Health introduced the new Kipu Helix Platform and Kipu Circle Partner Ecosystem. This leading technology platform for behavioral healthcare shared news of substantial company progress, including notable customer growth and nationwide expansion.

data.title: Synchrony Medical receives $1 million investment from NJIEF to expand its airway clearance system nationwide.
data.description: Synchrony Medical, a respiratory care technology company based in Jersey City, N.J., has recently secured a $1 million investment from NJIEF to support its expansion efforts in the U.S market. This investment matches the funding provided by Edge Medical Ventures. The company is the creator of the FDA-cleared LibAirty™ airway clearance device. The investment is aimed at facilitating the commercialization of their innovative product and further establishing their presence in the market.

A Sudanese medical official: 'The number of victims of the bombing of a support rally for the Rapid Support Forces in the city of Sennar has risen to 27 dead and 13 injured.'

data.title: 300 workers at Zum Transportation in Missouri join Teamsters Local 610 for fair pay and conditions.
data.description: Over 300 bus drivers and monitors in Missouri have decided to join Teamsters Local 610 and are gearing up to negotiate their first contract. Their main goals include advocating for fair wages, better working environments, and a stronger representation in decision-making processes.

data.title: Scale Computing™ makes CRN's 2026 Cloud 100 list for cloud infrastructure. Recognized for edge computing and network solutions.
data.description: Today, in Austin, Texas, on January 12, 2026, Scale Computing, a prominent company specializing in edge computing and network solutions, proudly revealed their inclusion in the esteemed 2026 Cloud 100 list. This recognition was specifically in the cloud infrastructure category by CRN®, a division of The Channel Company. The Cloud 100 list is renowned in the industry for highlighting the top players in cloud technology.

data.title: YorLabs completes first clinical procedure using FDA-cleared intracardiac imaging system.
data.description: In Beaverton, Oregon, YorLabs, Inc., a medical tech company specializing in advanced intracardiac imaging solutions for electrophysiology (EP) and interventional cardiology (IC), revealed the achievement of the initial clinical procedure on Jan. 12, 2026. The company is at the forefront of developing innovative imaging technologies in the medical field.

data.title: Mercedes-Benz USA's 2025 retail sales reached 343,200 units - 303,200 cars and 40,000 vans - marking a 1% increase from 2024.
data.description: In Atlanta, Mercedes-Benz USA (MBUSA) disclosed a yearly retail sales figure of 303,200 passenger cars, marking a 1% rise from 2024. In the same period, Mercedes-Benz Vans sold 40,000 units, totaling sales of 343,200 units. The surge can be primarily attributed to strong demand for the Mercedes-Benz SUV lineup and sustained interest in the high-performance Mercedes-AMG luxury models.
Socgen phases out its proprietary AI tool and uses Microsoft's Copilot. $MSFT

data.title: Woof.Play.Eat. debuts in Portland, Maine, combining dog park, restaurant, and bar; features 10,000 sq ft play space.
data.description: Woof.Play.Eat. has recently launched its unique dog-centered establishment at 49 Northport Drive in Portland, Maine. The venue caters to both dogs and their owners, providing an indoor-outdoor dog park and enrichment-focused daycare during its initial phase. A full-service restaurant and bar will also be introduced soon. Designed to withstand Maine's climate, Woof.Play.Eat. boasts a 10,000-square-foot play area for dogs to enjoy.
Greenland Prime Minister: Our security and defence belong in NATO.

data.title: Dean Sonderegger appointed as Senior VP and GM of Wolters Kluwer's ELM Solutions with 25+ years experience. Focused on growth and innovation.
data.description: A new Senior Vice President and General Manager has been appointed for Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory's ELM Solutions business. Dean Sonderegger, with over 25 years of experience in legal software, tax, and services industries, will lead the business. Known for his ability to drive growth and transformation, he is expected to propel ELM Solutions towards innovation and expansion. Martin O’Malley, CEO of Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory, expressed confidence in Sonderegger's capabilities for the role.

data.title: Natera partners with NVIDIA to enhance AI models for precision medicine, integrating in vivo datasets and machine learning.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Natera, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTRA), known for cell-free DNA testing and precision medicine, revealed its partnership with NVIDIA to push forward its multimodal AI foundation model platform growth. This venture aims to broaden precision medicine applications. Natera will combine its distinct longitudinal and multi-time point in vivo datasets, along with its exclusive machine learning models, with NVIDIA's high-performance computing resources to enhance the project.

data.title: DDN tops CRN's Cloud 100 list for 2026, recognized as leading AI data platform provider among 100 channel-focused companies.
data.description: In Chatsworth, California, DDN, a top AI data platform provider, was recently acknowledged on CRN's 2026 Cloud 100 list. This list identifies the top 100 cloud companies in various categories like cloud infrastructure, monitoring, security, software, and storage. CRN's Cloud 100 honors companies that are dedicated to backing channel partners. DDN's recognition reflects its standing in the competitive cloud industry.

data.title: ISG initiates studies on private, hybrid cloud services & solutions for data-intensive & AI-led workloads. #ISG #cloud
data.description: A study has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Connecticut, focusing on providers of private and hybrid cloud data center services tailored for data-intensive and AI-driven tasks. This investigation will analyze various companies operating in this sector to identify key trends and innovations. The city of Stamford is recognized for its business services and technology development, making it a suitable location for such research projects. This study by ISG aims to offer insights into the growing market for cloud data services, particularly those geared towards handling large amounts of data and supporting artificial intelligence applications. The findings from this study will provide valuable information for businesses looking to invest in cloud infrastructure to support their operations.
